title: First TV interview, Al Jazeera 'Liqa al-Yawm' (Tayseer Allouni)
dateStatus: Needs review — event date 2013-12-18 and broadcast date 2013-12-19 are recorded in the candidate file; the distinction between interview date and broadcast date has not been independently verified in this research pass
speakerNameMethodologicalNote: Contemporary public name at the time of this record: Abu Muhammad al-Jolani. The name Ahmad al-Sharaa is used here as a cross-period project identifier for organisational purposes and does not imply self-identification under that name at the date of this record.
evidenceSummary: A television interview on Al Jazeera Arabic, provisionally attributed to the programme 'Liqa al-Yawm' (Today's Meeting) with journalist Tayseer Allouni. The candidate file records this as the first known television interview given by Abu Muhammad al-Jolani, leader of Jabhat al-Nusra, with an event date of 18 December 2013 and a publication/broadcast date of 19 December 2013. These dates, the channel and programme attribution, the primary audio/video source, the recording location, and the transcript have not been confirmed through primary source verification. This item has not been reviewed in the current verification pass (which covered S2015-005 only).
publicResearchNote: This interview is retained as a Phase 1 corpus candidate because it is recorded as the first known television interview given by al-Jolani. The channel attribution, programme title, interviewer, dates, and primary source all require verification. No transcript has been located. This item has not been reviewed in the current verification pass.
